case_title: TAGGART GENEVA VS SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY TAGGART GENEVA AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-20-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAGGART GENEVA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY $800.00 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $808.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
